summary.forgetting_curve_note: All lessons have 1 prior attempt. Stability set to 7 days. Lessons older than ~21 days score >0.95 (mostly forgotten). Agent should prioritise by composite_priority_score.

scored_candidates.title: Unit 2A: Jobs - Lesson 1: What do you do?

worst_speaking_items.question: Okay, no problem. Can you say one job you like? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: I like a nurse because they help people every day.

worst_speaking_items.question: Nice. Can you tell me one thing a teacher does every day? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: A teacher plans lessons and helps students learn.

worst_speaking_items.question: Nice. What do you like about being a teacher? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: I like helping students learn and seeing them improve.

worst_speaking_items.question: A teacher — nice choice. What do you like about being a teacher? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: I like helping students learn and explain new things.

worst_speaking_items.question: Great, let’s start. Which job would you like to talk about first? 🙂
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: I want to talk about the nurse.
worst_speaking_items.user_transcript: I like to talk about a teacher.

worst_speaking_items.question: Do you mean your friend's name is July or Dian? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: My friend's name is July. She is very kind and sporty.

worst_speaking_items.question: Hi! Great — tell me about a friend you like. 😄
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: I have a friend named Ana. She is sporty and very kind.

worst_speaking_items.question: Oh nice. What do you like to do with Dan? 😊
worst_speaking_items.expected_answer: We like to watch movies and cook together.

failed_text_questions.question_type: Kéo thả vào chỗ trống trong đoạn văn
failed_text_questions.question_text: Reorder: clever | What | is | Why | Because
failed_text_questions.comment_plain: clever: thông minh What: Gì, Cái gì is: (động từ tobe + tính từ) Why: Tại sao Because: Bởi vì 1. What does she look like? Cô ấy trông như thế nào? 2. Because he's kind and hard-working: Bởi vì anh ấy tốt bụng và chăm chỉ. 3. Why do you like her? Tại sao bạn thích cô ấy? 4. She is tall and pretty: Cô ấy cao và xinh đẹp. 5. Because she's clever and friendly: Bởi vì cô ấy thông minh và thân thiện. =>
failed_text_questions.correct_answer: 1. What does she look like? 2. Because he's kind and hard-working. 3. Why do you like her? 4. She is tall and pretty. 5. Because she's clever and friendly.
